raw_consumer_statement: Hi, my identity has been stolen and i have someone making charges and opening accounts with my information. I called BestBuy on XX/XX/25 and they mentioned my card had been reported stolen and all my other charges have been disputed and refunded. Now i see another charge on XX/XX/25. It is NOT ME!!! Someone is impersonating me and making charges on my account, please remove all charges from my account as well as not issue any more cards for the time being as someone clearly has access to your systems.
